analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet asserts China’s COVID-19 response is effective and globally recognized, and condemns efforts to discredit China as malign blame-shifting that will be opposed by China and others. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent): Implicitly attacks unnamed actors (likely Western critics) as engaging in blame-shifting with malign intent. While not explicitly naming the West/US, the framing of hostile discrediting aligns with CH1’s depiction of hostile Western behavior. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): The tweet emphasizes China’s effective response and contribution recognized by the global community, suggesting constructive international conduct and alignment with global consensus—this supports the benevolent, cooperative image. CH3 (Epic history): No historical content. CH4 (Appropriate political system/values domestically): No discussion of political system or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): Praises effectiveness of China’s COVID-19 response—a governance success claim—thus fits CH5’s focus on government competence and achievement. CH6 (Culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1 (hostile West narrative implied), CH2 (benevolent international role), and CH5 (government success).
